name: shader-shader-bg
description: User-shader escape hatch (T-131d.2). Fragment body + scalar uniform drives a procedural background. Minimal GLSL exercises the prop-driven pipeline end-to-end.

props.glsl: void main(){ vec2 uv = v_uv; float v = 0.5 + 0.5 * sin(uv.x * 6.2831853 + u_time * u_speed); gl_FragColor = vec4(v, v * 0.6, 1.0 - v, 1.0); }
